supplementalResearch.title: 6. NVIDIA NIM (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 6. NVIDIA NIM (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Two modes: hosted API at build.nvidia.com (prototyping) and self-hosted NIM containers (production).

**LLM models (hosted API):**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `nvidia/nemotron-nano-9b-v2` | $0.04 (or Free) | $0.16 (or Free) | Reasoning, tool use |
| `nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b` | $0.05–$0.06 (or Free) | $0.20–$0.24 (or Free) | Hybrid Mamba-MoE |
| `nvidia/llama-3.3-nemotron-super-49b-v1.5` | $0.10 | $0.40 | Reasoning |
| `nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1` | Free (or $0.60) | Free (or $1.80) | Top-tier |
| `nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b` | $0.10 | $0.50 | LatentMoE |

**STT (Riva ASR NIM containers):**

| Model | Languages | Streaming |
|---|---|---|
| `parakeet-1-1b-rnnt-multilingual` | **25 languages** (auto-detect, diarization) | Yes |
| `parakeet-1-1b-ctc-en-us` | English | Yes |
| `nemotron-asr-streaming` | English | Yes (80ms–1120ms chunks) |
| `canary-1b` | en, de, fr, es (+ translation) | Offline |
| `whisper-large-v3` | 57+ languages | Offline |

**TTS (Riva TTS NIM containers):**

| Model | Languages | Voices |
|---|---|---|
| `magpie-tts-multilingual` | **9 languages** (en, es, fr, de, zh, vi, it, hi, ja) | Many with emotional variants |
| `magpie-tts-zeroshot` | English | Voice cloning (3-10s audio) |
| `fastpitch-hifigan-en-us` | English | Legacy |

APIs: gRPC + WebSocket for speech. OpenAI-compatible REST for LLMs.

**Free tier:** 1,000 inference credits on signup. Free 90-day AI Enterprise trial. Many models have free endpoints.

**Self-hosted pricing:** NVIDIA AI Enterprise license: **$4,500/GPU/year**. No per-token charges.

**Datacenters:** Hosted API on DGX Cloud. Self-hosted: any NVIDIA GPU infrastructure.

**Integration notes:** LLMs use OpenAI-compatible REST. Speech uses gRPC + WebSocket (Riva protocol). Docker containers for self-hosting. GPU requirement: Compute Capability ≥8.0, 16+ GB VRAM.

---
